title: Transcript: Bionano Genomics Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
text: Bionano Genomics reported Q1 2026 revenue of $6.7 million, representing 4% year-over-year growth. Flow cell sales reached 8,178 units, up 17% compared to the prior year quarter. Revenue breakdown: Consumables: $3.9 million (up 20% YoY), Software: $1.2 million (down 40% YoY), Other revenue: $1.6 million (up 36% YoY). Adjusted gross margin for the first quarter of 2026 was 49% compared to 46% in the prior year. The company continues disciplined expense management, with adjusted operating expenses at $9.1 million versus $8.5 million in Q1 2025. Management outlined four pillars: Supporting existing OGM and VIA software users, Increasing optical genome mapping utilization through software adoption, Building reimbursement infrastructure and clinical guidelines support, and Improving profitability. The CPT code for OGM in hematologic malignancies received a 47% payment increase to $1,853.22. A new code for constitutional genetic disorders was established at $1,263.53, effective January 2026. Management expects revenue growth throughout 2026, reaffirming guidance of $30-33 million annually. For Q2 2026, guidance ranges from $7.5-7.8 million. The company targets cash flow breakeven by Q4 2027 and plans to retire outstanding convertible debt this month.
